commit_scope: Review idea 036 (check_pipeline hierarchical view): spec verification scenarios, JSON merge fix for layer_0 placeholders, .gitignore repair, DIF pending local run

review_summary.feature: check_pipeline.py prints Goal→PM→Tasks→Artifacts; --json adds hierarchical layers; --flat legacy; uses GET /api/agent/status-report, /api/agent/effectiveness, /api/agent/pipeline-status
review_summary.implementation_verdict: Implemented in api/scripts/check_pipeline.py. Hierarchical sections, artifact output_len/preview, flags documented in spec 036.
review_summary.deploy_surface: No new endpoints. Script consumes existing GET /api/agent/status-report, /api/agent/pipeline-status, /api/agent/effectiveness, /api/agent/tasks/{id}/log. Production verification: curl these paths on api.coherencycoin.com or Railway URL.

dif_verify.note: Run: curl -s -X POST https://dif.merly.ai/api/v2/dif/verify -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d @- with code payload for api/scripts/check_pipeline.py

review_summary.code_change: Added _layer0_goal_usable_from_report() so JSON --json merge matches human-readable placeholder handling (substring not yet generated) instead of a stale exact string match.

deploy_validation.environment: production endpoints per spec Verification Scenarios section
